description: Style NoteFunky boxers for the fashion conscious male, this pair from fcuk comes with a high definition waistband. So revel in style and the comfort of soft fabric. These super airy boxers help your body breathe freely, while you laze at home and looks great when teamed with tees.Product DetailsBlue and white printed boxers that have a broad and stretchable waistband with fabric cover and branding, that sits snug and comfortably and has a button fly on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash delicate inside out using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanFlat dry in shadeCool iron inside out if needed
